title: R23+R24+R25+R26 — Verification + Subscriptions + Auth polish
notes: NEW: Creator Subscriptions — verified users can offer monthly subs (Instagram-style) with custom price + perks. Subscribers get badge, priority queue, sub-only rooms.
NEW: Verification badge system — apply via Settings → Get Verified, admin reviews, pay yearly fee in coins to activate the blue tick.
NEW: Forgot Password link + show/hide password toggle on login screen.
NEW: Capacitor appUrlOpen deep-link listener for password reset emails.
FIX: 22+ alert() calls in ProfileScreen replaced with toasts (no more 'ring-in.vercel.app says').
FIX: Delete Account + Delete Post use in-app modals instead of window.confirm.
FIX: Mock data killed — fake EXPERTS, EXPERT_CONVOS_BASE, SAMPLE_SETS, mock posts seed all removed.
FIX: Workshops tab + Anonymous Connect orb hidden (100% mock features) until real impl lands.
FIX: CallScreen — toggleSpeaker bug, speaker state reset on unmount, localCoins no longer shows 'undefined coins remaining'.
FIX: Privacy settings (Profile Visibility, Lock Profile, Hide Likes) now wired to Supabase + RLS enforcement, not localStorage-only.
